title: Orbit — GKG webserver
description: All metrics emitted by the GKG webserver: HTTP + gRPC transport, query pipeline, content resolution, query-engine threat counters, schema watcher.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, http_route, http_response_status_code, http_request_method) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, http_route, http_response_status_code, http_request_method) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, http_route, http_response_status_code, http_request_method) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, rpc_service, rpc_method, rpc_grpc_status_code) (rate(rpc_server_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, rpc_service, rpc_method, rpc_grpc_status_code) (rate(rpc_server_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, rpc_service, rpc_method, rpc_grpc_status_code) (rate(rpc_server_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, rpc_service, rpc_method) (rate(rpc_server_requests_per_rpc_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, rpc_service, rpc_method) (rate(rpc_server_requests_per_rpc_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, rpc_service, rpc_method) (rate(rpc_server_requests_per_rpc_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, rpc_service, rpc_method) (rate(rpc_server_responses_per_rpc_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, rpc_service, rpc_method) (rate(rpc_server_responses_per_rpc_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, rpc_service, rpc_method) (rate(rpc_server_responses_per_rpc_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, query_type, status) (rate(gkg_query_pipeline_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, query_type, status) (rate(gkg_query_pipeline_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, query_type, status) (rate(gkg_query_pipeline_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, query_type, label) (rate(gkg_query_pipeline_ch_memory_usage_bytes_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, query_type, label) (rate(gkg_query_pipeline_ch_memory_usage_bytes_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
